DWNs perform computation using multiple layers of directly chained lookup tables
inputs are binarized using unary thermometer encoding to address lookup tables
binarized inputs are formed into tuples and concatenated
tuples are concatenated to address the first layer of LUTs
binary LUT outputs are used to form addresses for subsequent layers
outputs from the final layer of LUTs are summed to derive activations for each output class
